pi_items.source: task.json description field explicitly states 'Create a new survey with this exact title'
task.json description states 'Create a custom token attribute named EmployeeID (Description: Employee ID Number)'; LimeSurvey official docs confirm custom token attributes feature exists

task.json description specifies email subject should be 'Your Voting Link - 2025 Benefits'; metadata extracts the expected grep substring correctly; LimeSurvey docs confirm surveyls_email_register_subj field supports custom subjects
task.json description states 'body includes the phrase Your vote is anonymous'; LimeSurvey docs confirm surveyls_email_register field supports custom body templates

privileged_info_summary: The task 'anonymous_registered_voting_setup' configures a LimeSurvey instance (image: martialblog/limesurvey:6-apache, admin credentials: admin/Admin123!) to create a survey titled '2025 Employee Benefits Vote' with critical privacy features: anonymized responses enabled, public registration enabled, custom token attribute 'EmployeeID' created, and registration email customized with subject containing 'Your Voting Link' and body containing 'Your vote is anonymous'. All metadata claims match the task description requirements and align with verified LimeSurvey features and database schema (lime_surveys table with anonymized/allowregister/active fields; lime_surveys_languagesettings with email template fields; custom attributes stored in surveyls_attributedescriptions).
